config.script:
system.perspective.closePopup("Inspection")
	try:
		stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
		state='Info'
		userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
		ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
		message = 'Inspection Cancelled'
		Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,message)
	except:
		pass

"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 24/06/2024
	Purpose:
			The purpose of the script to close inspection at quality gate.
	Modified By : Aniket Sagar
	ModifiedOn: 15/05/2025
	Purpose: VOR order set orderstatus=8 at QG04 and QG05 without backflushing 
	"""	
	try:
		area = self.session.custom.CurrentAreaId
		line = self.session.custom.CurrentLineId
		workStation = self.view.params.workStationName
		serialNumber=(self.view.params.serialNumber).upper()
		system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Quality/updateIsActive",{'SerialNumber':serialNumber})
		orderNumber=self.view.params.orderNumber
		bom =self.view.params.bom
		system.perspective.print('Bom= %s'%bom)
		modelName=self.view.params.modelNumber
		createdBy= self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		inspectionListTable = self.view.params.checkListData
		OperatorID= self.view.params.OperatorID
		system.perspective.print("Lenght:%s"%str(len(inspectionListTable)))
		if(len(inspectionListTable) > 0):
			for row in range(len(inspectionListTable)):
				system.perspective.print("Inside Loop:%s"%str(row))
				status = inspectionListTable[row]['Status']
				if(str(status) == 'True' or str(status) == '1'):
					status= 'Ok'
				else:
					status= 'Not Ok'	
				checkList = inspectionListTable[row]['CheckListID']
				remark = inspectionListTable[row]['Remark']
				params= {'Area':area ,'Line':line, 'CheckList': checkList,'Remark':remark,'Status':status ,'WorkStation':workStation, 'SerialNumber':serialNumber, 'OrderNo':orderNumber, 'CreatedBy':createdBy, 'BOM':bom,'ModelName':modelName,'OperatorID':OperatorID}
				system.perspective.print(params)
				system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/Quality/insertQualityCheck',params)
		params = {'Area':area,'Line':line,'WorkStation':self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId,'BOMId':self.session.custom.BOMId,'SerialNumber':serialNumber,'Status':2,'CreatedBy':createdBy}
		result=system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/OperatorDashboard/InsertStationStatus",params)
		### send print of barcode in case of PDI Quality gate
		if 'PDI'in workStation: 
			res=system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/WashingMachine/GetPrinterDetails",{'WorkStation':self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId})
			pyres=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(res)
			for row in pyres:
				IP = row["IPAddress"]
				port = row["Port"]
			Project_VECV.Printer.GetPrint.getPDIPrint(serialNumber, IP, port,line)
		if str(self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation).upper() in  ['LAQG04', 'LAQG05','TAQG02']:
			res=system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/WashingMachine/GetPrinterDetails",{'WorkStation':self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId})
			pyres=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(res)
			for row in pyres:
				IP = row["IPAddress"]
				port = row["Port"]
			data = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/getPartNumber",{"MST_WorkStation_Id":self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId,"M_BOM_Id":self.session.custom.BOMId})
			partNumber = ''
			partNumber=bom
			    
			#partNumber = dt['M_MaterialNumber']
			#partNumber=bom
			gearRatio = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/ITSupport/getGearRatio",{"SerialNumber":serialNumber})
			Project_VECV.Printer.GetPrint.getDHPrint(serialNumber,IP,port,partNumber,gearRatio)
			res=system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Quality/VOROrderBook",{'serial_number':serialNumber})
			if res==1:
				Project_VECV.Printer.GetPrint.getDHVorPrint(IP,port)
			system.perspective.print("Print Sent--------------->")
				#system.perspective.print('Print sent for %s'%self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation)
		if str(self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation).upper() in  ['TAQG01']:
			res=system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/WashingMachine/GetPrinterDetails",{'WorkStation':self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId})
			pyres=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(res)
			for row in pyres:
				IP = row["IPAddress"]
				port = row["Port"]
			data = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/getPartNumber",{"MST_WorkStation_Id":self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId,"M_BOM_Id":self.session.custom.BOMId})
			partNumber = ''
			for dt in data:    
				partNumber = dt['M_MaterialNumber']
				
				gearRatio = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/ITSupport/getGearRatio",{"SerialNumber":serialNumber})
				Project_VECV.Printer.GetPrint.getTAQG01Print(serialNumber,IP,port,partNumber,gearRatio)
				#system.perspective.print('Print sent for %s'%self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation)
		
		if str(self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation).upper() in ['LAQG03','TAQG03']:
			res=system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/WashingMachine/GetPrinterDetails",{'WorkStation':self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId})
			pyres=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(res)
			for row in pyres:
				IP = row["IPAddress"]
				port = row["Port"]
			Project_VECV.Printer.GetPrint.getPrintHub(IP, port, serialNumber, bom)
			
		# VOR order set orderstatus=8
		if str(self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation).upper() in ['LAQG04','LAQG05']:
			system.perspective.print("In onClickEvent on InspectionSAveButton serialNumber Param= %s"%self.view.params.serialNumber)
			res=system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Quality/VOROrderBook",{'serial_number':self.view.params.serialNumber})
			system.perspective.print("In onClickEvent on InspectionSAveButton res= %s"%res)
			if res==1:
				system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Quality/VOROrderBookQg4Qg5",{'serial_number':self.view.params.serialNumber,'ModifiedBy':createdBy})
				system.perspective.print("In onClickEvent on InspectionSAveButton ORDER BOOKED serialNumber= %s"%self.view.params.serialNumber)
				try:
				    stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
				    state='Info'
				    userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
				    ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
				    message = 'VOR/cSPD order has been BOOKED for SerialNumber %s'%serialNumber
				    Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,message)
				except:
					pass
		#VOR order set orderstatus=8
		
		system.perspective.sendMessage("flash",payload={},scope='page')
		system.perspective.sendMessage("SaveExceedTime", scope='page')
		system.perspective.sendMessage('refreshserial')
		system.perspective.sendMessage('RefreshQualityCheck')		
		system.perspective.closePopup("Inspection")
		try:
		    stationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
		    state='Info'
		    userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
		    ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
		    message = 'Inspection completed for SerialNumber %s'%serialNumber
		    Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,message)
		except:
			pass
	except:	
		#start of except block		
		screenName ='Quality Insert' 
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/PopUp/Quality Inspection')
		errorFunction = str('Event:onClick- cntStep/btnAdd')
		errorType=str('Application')
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID()) 
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error occur			
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)
